name: pwa-service-worker
description: Minimal Progressive Web App package: service worker handling 'push' + 'notificationclick' events, manifest scaffolding, Web Share Target receiver. Designed to compose with web-push-vapid.
postInstall: 1. Add <ServiceWorkerRegister /> to your root layout.tsx body
2. Add a public/manifest.json with name, icons and start_url
3. Add <link rel='manifest' href='/manifest.json' /> in your root <head>
4. For Web Share Target: add 'share_target' to manifest.json pointing at /share (the page that mounts ShareTargetModal)
5. Optionally pair with web-push-vapid — sw.js already handles 'push' events
